statement: In every magma, Equation 1017 (`x = y * ((z * w) * (u * w))`) implies Equation 2245 (`x = (x * (x * (y * x))) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0120
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) (op u w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op x (op x (op y x))) z)
